item.title: Tung Tung Sahur is a viral AI-generated internet meme and "Italian brainrot" character that originated on TikTok. It takes the form of an anthropomorphic kentongan (an Indonesian slit drum) that walks around at night repeating the phrase "tung, tung, tung
item.description: By @meme_flix7: Tung Tung Sahur is a viral AI-generated internet meme and "Italian brainrot" character that originated on TikTok. It takes the form of an anthropomorphic kentongan (an Indonesian slit drum) that walks around at night repeating the phrase "tung, tung, tung
